series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with petitions to designate lands unsuitable for coal mining submitted to the Division and include, but are not limited to: the petition, supporting and opposing evidence, notices, publications, transcripts or recordings from public hearings, internal review documents, maps, comments, receipts of mailings, and Chief''s decisions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records to be retained for five years after expiration of the period during which the mining operation is active or is covered by any portion of a reclamation performance security and then destroyed. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Electronic records will be retained permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
